name: Breza Bus Svc Inc
carrier_operation: Interstate; Authorized For Hire (Passenger - Motor Passenger Common Carrier)
registry_source: NJ Division of Revenue & Enterprise Services (not directly verified)
notes: USDOT 872148 / MC 680070 matches name+address (101 E Inman Ave, Rahway, NJ). SAFER currently lists USDOT 872148 as INACTIVE; per loadconnect.io and broker-snapshot mirrors, operating authority was revoked May 28, 2014, and MCS-150 last updated Aug 2013 (190,000 miles 2012). Industry sources indicate Breza Bus Service was founded around 1956 (per Yelp/yellowpages); not independently verified via NJ SOS. NJ AG had a 2007 consumer-fraud complaint against the company (separate matter). Power units 31 (1 truck + 2 small school bus + 28 school bus 16+); 24 drivers per last MCS-150. Likely now inactive/dormant; would need NJ business name search to confirm entity_status.

name: CMR School Bus Co LLC

notes: Could not confidently identify an FMCSA SAFER record matching CMR School Bus Co LLC at 143 Essex St, Haverhill, MA. Search returned CMR TRANSPORT LLC (USDOT 3390996) - but that record is in Puyallup, WA, NOT a match. CMR TRANSPORT INC (USDOT 1256445), CMR TRANSPORTATION LLC (USDOT 3492840), CMR LOGISTICS LLC (USDOT 3232143) all appear unrelated to Haverhill MA. CMR School Bus may operate exclusively as a MA 7D school pupil transportation operator (these don't always require interstate USDOT registration). Company appears active per multiple 2024-2026 business directory listings (phones 978-252-0888 / 978-641-3702). Massachusetts Sec of Commonwealth corp search not directly accessible via WebFetch (requires interactive search). Recommend manual lookup at corp.sec.state.ma.us.

name: C J's Bus Svc Inc
carrier_operation: Passenger carrier (likely Interstate Authorized For Hire per MC 86853 docket)
entity_status: active (per business directories operating as of 2026)
registry_source: NJ Division of Revenue & Enterprise Services (not directly verified)
notes: FMCSA SAFER lists carrier as CJ'S BUS SUPPLIES & SERVICE INC (USDOT 3119024, MC 86853) - this matches the location 277 Harding Hwy, Elmer NJ 08318 per multiple sources (Yelp, D&B, ZoomInfo, BrokerSnapshot). However, the SAFER record currently shows status as INACTIVE. Company is still operating per 2026 business directory listings (phone 856-712-2132 / 856-863-0779 / 609-221-6997). Reported revenue $500K-$1M, 5-9 employees. Possible OpenCorporates NJ entry exists (us_nj/0100837338) but not directly verified. NJ school bus contractor codes list also references the company. Discrepancy: SAFER 'inactive' status conflicts with business directories showing active operations - may indicate USDOT lapse with continued intrastate operation. Power units/drivers not available because SAFER record displays only inactive notice.

name: Kinder Glide Inc
carrier_operation: Likely intrastate school pupil transportation (NJ approved school bus contractor)
fmcsa_address: 1115 Green Grove Rd, Neptune, NJ 07753 (per source listings)
inc_date: unknown (Children's Center has existed >30 years per its own materials)
entity_status: active (per Facebook page and NJ school bus contractor lists)
registry_source: NJ Division of Revenue & Enterprise Services (not directly verified)
notes: Kinder Glide Inc is the transportation arm of the Children's Center of Monmouth County (a private special-education school for ages 3-21 serving students with autism and developmental disabilities) located at 1115 Green Grove Rd, Neptune, NJ 07753. Confirmed via official Facebook page 'Children's Center of Monmouth County / Kinder Glide'. Address also confirmed as Children's Center via Trulia, PropertyShark, and the organization's own contact page (ccprograms.com). Kinder Glide appears in NJ Dept of Education school bus contractor codes lists. No FMCSA SAFER match identified - likely operates exclusively intrastate transporting students from Children's Center, which may not require interstate USDOT registration; or operates under the parent non-profit's registration. NJ business records search would be required for inc_date and entity_status. Phone (732) 922-1326 or (732) 922-0228 (Children's Center main).

Same entity - Community Bus Services Inc maintains facilities and offices in Mahoning and Trumbull counties and serves Ashtabula, Cuyahoga, Franklin, Geauga, Lake, Licking, Mahoning, Montgomery, and Trumbull counties. USDOT 822850 ACTIVE; 20 power units, 27 drivers; intrastate only; no safety rating on file; 18 vehicle inspections past 24 months with 0 OOS violations; 2 crashes (1 injury, 1 tow). Company founded 1933 per its website com-bus.com and corroborating sources - exact Ohio SOS original filing date would require manual lookup at businesssearch.ohiosos.gov (Cloudflare-blocked WebFetch).
